description:
Investigate and Fix Gallery Image Loading Errors

Resolve the 404 error that occurs when clicking on gallery images, preventing them from displaying correctly.

Requirements:
- Investigate why clicking gallery images triggers 404 errors for image files
- Verify the actual location and file structure of gallery images in the project
- Check if image paths in the gallery code match the actual file locations
- Correct the path references (currently looking in /images/gallery/daily/ but files may be elsewhere)
- Ensure the correct base URL and path concatenation logic
- Test image loading across all galleries, not just the specific 02.jpg case
- Verify that the fix works for both development (localhost:1313) and production environments
- Check if other gallery images have the same path issue or if it's isolated to specific files

Edge Cases to Consider:
- Images with different naming conventions or in different subdirectories
- Images that may have been moved or reorganized
- Relative vs absolute path handling
- Any build/bundling process that may affect image paths
